seo.title: Contact
seo.description: Contact Geek Engine for support, studio inquiries, feature feedback, launch updates, and early access questions.

hero.heading: Let's optimize your development velocity.
hero.sub: Whether you're an independent creator needing help with billing or a multi-team game studio requiring bespoke workflow infrastructure — we're here to help.

channels.label: Pick a channel
channels.heading: Three routes in, real humans on the other end.

items.title: Creator help desk
items.body: Have questions about credit balances, seat licensing top-ups, or workspace permissions management?

items.title: Enterprise studio relations
items.body: Request custom build environments, elevated storage thresholds, or white-label distribution agreements.

items.title: Feature & community feedback
items.body: Have recommendations for our task board pipeline, asset synthesizers, or self-healing error catchers?

direct.label: Direct routes
direct.heading: Prefer email or live? Reach us directly.
direct.supportDetail: ↳ for billing, accounts, and account-related issues
direct.enterpriseDetail: ↳ for custom builds, white-label, and procurement

form.label: Workspace ticket
form.messagePlaceholder: Project, plan, error messages, what you're trying to do...
form.footnote: ↳ tickets land in our Linear board with the same audit hygiene as your studio's

ctaStrip.heading: Product access is coming soon.
ctaStrip.sub: Subscribe for launch notes, access windows, and founder updates.
